glosses.vi: tính di động; khả năng di chuyển
glosses.ja: モビリティ; 移動性

translations.en: My mobility is limited right now.
translations.fr: Ma mobilité est limitée en ce moment.
translations.pt: Minha mobilidade está limitada no momento.
translations.vi: Hiện giờ tôi đi lại khó khăn.
translations.nl: Mijn mobiliteit is op dit moment beperkt.
translations.hi: अभी मुझे चलने-फिरने में दिक्कत है.
translations.el: Αυτή τη στιγμή η κινητικότητά μου είναι περιορισμένη.
translations.nb: Mobiliteten min er begrenset akkurat nå.
translations.sv: Min rörlighet är begränsad just nu.
translations.da: Min mobilitet er begrænset lige nu.

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (1st person singular), modifying the noun 'Mobilität'; agrees in gender/number/case with the head noun (feminine, nominative singular as subject).
Common noun, head of the subject noun phrase; refers to the general concept of mobility.
Copular auxiliary (3rd person singular present), linking the subject 'Mobilität' to the predicative complement.
Temporal adverb indicating the current time; modifies the clause to mark a present state.
Predicative adjective (past participle used adjectivally) describing the state of the subject; derived from the separable verb 'einschränken'.

translations.es: La ciudad promueve la movilidad sostenible.
translations.fr: La ville encourage la mobilité durable.
translations.it: La città promuove la mobilità sostenibile.
translations.zh-Hans: 这座城市提倡可持续出行。
translations.yue: 呢個城市推動可持續出行。
translations.pt: A cidade promove a mobilidade sustentável.
translations.vi: Thành phố thúc đẩy đi lại bền vững.
translations.hu: A város támogatja a fenntartható közlekedést.
translations.hi: शहर टिकाऊ आवागमन को बढ़ावा देता है.
translations.el: Η πόλη προωθεί τη βιώσιμη κινητικότητα.
translations.ja: 市は持続可能な移動を促進している。

tokens.explanation: Definite article introducing the subject noun 'Stadt'; marked for feminine nominative singular.
Common noun, head of the subject; denotes a municipal entity.
Finite main verb (3rd person singular present), transitive; takes 'nachhaltige Mobilität' as its direct object.
Attributive adjective modifying 'Mobilität'; inflected with -e for feminine accusative singular to agree with the head noun.
Common noun, head of the object noun phrase; accusative singular as the direct object of 'fördert'.

sentences.target: Mit dem Ticket habe ich mehr Mobilität.
sentences.reading: /mɪt deːm ˈtɪkɛt ˈhaːbə ɪç meːɐ̯ moːbiliˈtɛːt/

translations.de: Mit dem Ticket habe ich mehr Mobilität.
translations.ipa: /mɪt deːm ˈtɪkɛt ˈhaːbə ɪç meːɐ̯ moːbiliˈtɛːt/
translations.en: With the ticket I have more mobility.
translations.es: Con el billete puedo moverme más.
translations.fr: Avec le ticket, je peux me déplacer plus facilement.
translations.it: Con il biglietto posso muovermi di più.
translations.ko: 표가 있으면 더 자유롭게 이동할 수 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 有了这张票，我出行更方便了。
translations.yue: 有咗呢張票，我出行方便咗。
translations.ru: С этим билетом мне проще передвигаться.
translations.pt: Com o bilhete tenho mais mobilidade.
translations.he: עם הכרטיס אני יכול להתנייד יותר בקלות.
translations.vi: Có vé, tôi đi lại dễ dàng hơn.
translations.ar: مع التذكرة أستطيع التنقل بسهولة أكبر.
translations.nl: Met het kaartje kan ik me makkelijker verplaatsen.
translations.hi: टिकट से मेरी आवाजाही आसान हो जाती है.
translations.pl: Z biletem łatwiej mi się przemieszczać.
translations.el: Με το εισιτήριο μπορώ να μετακινούμαι πιο εύκολα.
translations.nb: Med billetten kan jeg komme meg rundt lettere.
translations.id: Dengan tiket, saya bisa bepergian lebih mudah.
translations.sv: Med biljetten kan jag ta mig runt lättare.
translations.ro: Cu biletul mă pot deplasa mai ușor.
translations.cs: S jízdenkou se můžu snadněji pohybować.
translations.da: Med billetten kan jeg komme rundt lettere.
translations.ja: この切符があれば、もっと自由に移動できます。

tokens.explanation: Preposition governing the dative; introduces a prepositional phrase expressing means/instrument.
Definite article in dative singular, agreeing with 'Ticket' (neuter); part of the PP headed by 'Mit'.
Common noun (borrowed), object of the preposition 'Mit' in dative; denotes the instrument providing access.
Finite main verb (1st person singular present); takes 'mehr Mobilität' as a direct object.
Personal pronoun, nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Quantifying determiner modifying 'Mobilität'; functions as a degree/amount specifier within the object NP.
Common noun, head of the direct object; accusative singular complement of 'habe'.

sentences.target: Seine Mobilität verbessert sich langsam wieder.

translations.de: Seine Mobilität verbessert sich langsam wieder.
translations.en: His mobility is slowly improving again.
translations.es: Su movilidad vuelve a mejorar poco a poco.
translations.fr: Sa mobilité s'améliore de nouveau peu à peu.
translations.it: La sua mobilità sta migliorando di nuovo lentamente.
translations.ko: 그의 거동이 서서히 다시 좋아지고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 他的行动能力又在慢慢改善。
translations.yue: 佢嘅行動能力慢慢好返。
translations.pt: A mobilidade dele está melhorando aos poucos de novo.
translations.tr: Hareket kabiliyeti yavaş yavaş yeniden düzeliyor.
translations.vi: Khả năng đi lại của anh ấy đang dần cải thiện trở lại.
translations.ar: قدرته على الحركة تتحسن ببطء من جديد.
translations.nl: Zijn mobiliteit wordt langzaam weer beter.
translations.hi: उसकी चलने-फिरने की क्षमता फिर से धीरे-धीरे सुधर रही है.
translations.pl: Jego sprawność ruchowa znowy powoli się poprawia.
translations.el: Η κινητικότητατά του βελτιώνεται ξανά σιγά σιγά.
translations.nb: Mobiliteten hans blir sakte bedre igjen.
translations.sv: Hans rörlighet blir långsamt bättre igen.
translations.ro: Mobilitatea lui se îmbunătățește din nou treptat.
translations.cs: Jeho mobilita se znovy pomalu zlepšuje.
translations.da: Hans mobilitet bliver langsomt bedre igen.
translations.ja: 彼の動きは少しずつまた良くなってきています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (3rd person singular masculine possessor), modifying 'Mobilität'; agrees with the feminine nominative singular head noun.
Common noun, head of the subject; nominative singular.
Finite main verb (3rd person singular present) in a reflexive construction; denotes the process of becoming better.
Reflexive pronoun (accusative) coreferential with the subject; required by 'sich verbessern' to form a reflexive verb phrase.
Manner adverb modifying the verb phrase; indicates the speed of improvement.
Temporal/frequency adverb meaning 'again'; marks a return to a previous state.
